creator: tony@git-pull.com
text:
Hey there! Going to give this a shot :)

When I tried to apply the patch (via diff -p1 < svndiffile) it doesn't apply cleanly.

From within the project directory (desktuils/py-khal) @ head:391734:

$ patch -p1 < ~/work/patches/py-khal-201464.txt
Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|Index: Makefile
|===================================================================
|--- Makefile	(revision 391725)
|+++ Makefile	(working copy)
--------------------------
Patching file Makefile using Plan A...
Reversed (or previously applied) patch detected!  Assume -R? [y] n
Apply anyway? [n] y
Hunk #1 succeeded at 2 with fuzz 2 (offset 1 line).
Hunk #2 succeeded at 12 (offset -1 lines).
done


Am I applying the patch incorrectly?  Maybe it's just a formatting thing?
